DefaultData.name: Alexandra Chen
DefaultData.title: Senior Product Designer
DefaultData.summary: Product designer with 8+ years crafting intuitive digital experiences at Notion, Figma & Dropbox. Passionate about building products that make a real difference.

experience.title: Senior Product Designer
bullets: Led end-to-end editor redesign, boosting user retention by 22% and platform engagement.
Managed a scalable design system, streamlining collaboration for a 15-person engineering team. Conducted 40+ user interviews to extract insights and directly shape the feature roadmap.
